coach_notes: To build a strong support career, focus on developing problem-solving and organization skills, as these are foundational for handling complex tasks and improving efficiency. You can practice problem-solving by tackling small challenges at work or using online scenarios, and improve organization by using tools like calendars and to-do lists. Your existing administrative and data entry experience gives you a great base—start by integrating these skills into your daily routine to boost your confidence and marketability.

jobs.title: Customer Service Representative
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Excellent communication, customer service, and order processing skills are core to this role.
jobs.gaps: No specific mention of handling high-volume phone calls or CRM software experience.

jobs.title: Hospital Reference Test Clerk
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Administrative paperwork and communication skills align with clerical duties in a hospital setting.
jobs.gaps: No experience with medical reference testing, lab protocols, or healthcare-specific terminology.

jobs.title: Office Assistant-LH Orthopedics Odenton
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Strong administrative duties, scheduling, and communication skills directly apply to an orthopedics office assistant role.
jobs.gaps: Lack of direct healthcare office experience and knowledge of medical terminology for orthopedics.

jobs.title: Customer Service - Self Storage Manager
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Administrative duties, scheduling, and network management (for property systems) are relevant; warehouse experience helps with storage operations.
jobs.gaps: No direct self-storage management experience, sales, or tenant relations background.

jobs.title: Office Assistant-Surgical Specialists
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Administrative duties, scheduling, and communication skills are directly applicable to a surgical specialists office.
jobs.gaps: Lack of medical office experience, knowledge of surgical scheduling, and medical terminology.
